suspicious_activity.narrative: Jacqueline Rodriguez (CUST_0111), a high-risk customer, engaged in a pattern of suspicious activities throughout 2025. She conducted a high volume of transactions, including large wire transfers, which are indicative of money laundering. Notably, on 2025-07-29, she received an incoming wire transfer of $76,517.25, followed by multiple large outgoing wire transfers, including $14,019.62 on 2025-07-31. These activities warrant reporting due to their alignment with money laundering typologies.
